title: Workflow of Generating a KYC Report
summary: This skill outlines the workflow for generating a Know Your Customer (KYC) report, encompassing company website research, GLEIF/LEI lookup, and adverse media/news screening to build a foundational client profile.

root_steps.title: Company Website Research
root_steps.description: Review the company's official website to understand its business overview, products/services, leadership team, strategic priorities, geographic footprint, and regulatory disclosures.

root_steps.title: GLEIF / LEI Lookup
root_steps.description: Using the GLEIF database, retrieve the company's legal entity identifier (LEI), registered address, entity status, and analyze the ownership structure, including direct and ultimate parent relationships.

root_steps.title: Adverse Media / News Screening
root_steps.description: Search sources like Google News and public filings to identify any negative news, sanctions exposure, regulatory actions, or legal proceedings associated with the company.
